# Business Case Update Report

## Purpose
Provide a structured update to the original business case, comparing planned versus actual
investment, benefits, and risks to inform continued funding decisions.

## Audience
Executive Sponsor, Finance Partner, PMO Lead, Portfolio Manager.

---

- **Payback period:** [Actual] vs [Projected]
- **Business case health:** [Strong/Moderate/Weak]

## Completion Checklist
- [ ] Original vs current financials compared.
- [ ] Benefit realization assessed.
- [ ] Risks and mitigation impacts updated.
- [ ] Recommendation documented.

## Acceptance Criteria
- Leadership can determine whether to continue, modify, or stop investment.
- Updated projections align with portfolio governance requirements.
